results.title: Mercedes-AMG E 53 PHEV India Launch on July 23 With Over 100km EV Range
results.description: Mercedes-Benz is set to introduce the AMG E 53 HYBRID 4MATIC+ in India on July 23, reviving the E 53 sedan with a plug-in hybrid system offering over 100km of electric-only range.

results.title: M7 Ultra to potentially feature up to 1.5TB of RAM, finally matching 2019 Mac Pro: report - 9to5Mac
results.description: M7 Ultra to potentially feature up to 1.5TB of RAM, finally matching 2019 Mac Pro: report 9to5Mac

results.title: Google releases healthcare AI search report showing impressions but no click or outcome data
results.description: Google's June 3 AI report tracks impressions but zero clicks, creating clinical risks for health systems. Providers cannot measure if AI answers drive patient appointments.

results.title: The great wipeout: Nvidia lost $1 trillion within two months
results.description: Nvidia recorded a 16% drop from its peak to its lowest level since 2019. But still, do not count it out, because its business performance is at a peak. So where did the investors' money disappear?
